regex.source: .setDesc(`Modes are a new type of Workspace that store all of the native Obsidian Editor, Files & Links,
regex.target: .setDesc(`模式是一种新类型的工作区，用于存储所有本地 Obsidian 编辑器、文件和链接，

regex.source: and Appearance settings. Enabling this will add a new mode switcher to the status bar that will allow you
regex.target: 和外观设置。启用此功能将在状态栏中添加一个新的模式切换器，允许您

regex.source: to save, apply, rename, and switch between modes.`
regex.target: 保存、应用、重命名和在模式之间切换。`

regex.source: .setDesc(`This option will auto save your current workspace on any layout change.
regex.target: .setDesc(`此选项将在任何布局更改时自动保存当前工作区。

regex.source: Leave this disabled if you want full control over when your workspace is saved.`
regex.target: 如果您希望完全控制工作区的保存时间，请将此选项保持为禁用状态。`
